description: Clinical drug information server providing access to pharmaceutical databases, including drug search, detailed monographs, interaction checking, condition-based medication discovery, and product barcode identification services.

tools.name: search_drugs
tools.description: Search the DrugBank database for pharmaceutical substances by name, brand, active ingredient, or chemical synonym.

query.description: Search term matching drug names, brand names, active ingredients, or chemical identifiers.

fuzzy.description: Enable approximate string matching to accommodate spelling variations and typographical errors (default: true).

limit.description: Maximum number of search results to return, controlling result set size (default: 10).

drugs.description: List of pharmaceutical substances matching the search criteria.

drugbank_id.description: The unique DrugBank accession identifier assigned to the pharmaceutical compound.

name.description: The primary generic or proprietary name of the pharmaceutical product.

description.description: Comprehensive clinical description of the drug's pharmacological properties and therapeutic applications.

synonyms.description: Alternative brand names, chemical names, or abbreviations used to identify the drug.

categories.description: Therapeutic classification categories indicating the drug's medical use or pharmacological class.

atc_codes.description: Anatomical Therapeutic Chemical (ATC) classification codes from the WHO drug classification system.

tools.name: get_drug_details
tools.description: Retrieve comprehensive pharmacological and clinical information for a specific drug using its DrugBank identifier.

drugbank_id.description: The unique DrugBank accession identifier assigned to the pharmaceutical compound.
The unique DrugBank accession identifier assigned to the pharmaceutical compound.

name.description: The primary generic or proprietary name of the pharmaceutical product.

description.description: Comprehensive clinical description of the drug's pharmacological properties and therapeutic applications.

mechanism_of_action.description: Description of the specific biochemical interaction through which the drug produces its pharmacological effect.

pharmacodynamics.description: Description of the drug's biochemical and physiological effects on the body and mechanism of action.

absorption.description: Information regarding the drug's uptake into systemic circulation from the site of administration.

metabolism.description: Description of the chemical transformation processes the drug undergoes within the body.

indications.description: List of medically approved therapeutic uses and conditions for which the drug is prescribed.

contraindications.description: List of medical conditions or circumstances where the drug should not be used due to potential harm.

dosage_forms.description: Available pharmaceutical formulations and routes of administration (e.g., tablet, injection, suspension).

side_effects.description: Documented adverse reactions and unwanted effects associated with therapeutic use.

pregnancy_category.description: FDA or standard pregnancy safety classification indicating risk level during gestation.

tools.name: check_drug_interactions
tools.description: Analyze multiple drugs for potential pharmacological interactions, contraindications, and clinical severity.

drugs.description: List of drug identifiers (DrugBank IDs or common names) to analyze for potential pharmacological interactions.

interactions.description: List of clinically significant drug-drug interactions identified between the specified medications.

drug1.description: The identifier or name of the first drug involved in the interaction.

drug2.description: The identifier or name of the second drug involved in the interaction.

severity.description: Clinical severity rating of the interaction (minor, moderate, or major).

description.description: Detailed explanation of the pharmacological interaction mechanism and clinical effects.

management.description: Clinical recommendations for managing or mitigating the interaction risk.

interaction_count.description: Total number of clinically significant interactions identified between the specified drugs.

highest_severity.description: The most severe interaction level detected among all drug pairs analyzed (none, minor, moderate, or major).

tools.name: search_by_condition
tools.description: Discover medications used to treat specific medical conditions, diseases, or therapeutic indications.

condition.description: Medical condition, disease name, or therapeutic indication to search for appropriate treatments.

drugs.description: List of pharmaceutical products indicated for treatment of the specified medical condition.

drugbank_id.description: The unique DrugBank accession identifier assigned to the pharmaceutical compound.

name.description: The primary generic or proprietary name of the pharmaceutical product.

indication_type.description: Classification of the drug's approval status for the specific condition (approved, off-label, or investigational).

efficacy.description: Qualitative or quantitative assessment of the drug's therapeutic effectiveness for the indication.

tools.name: get_drug_by_barcode
tools.description: Identify pharmaceutical products and retrieve detailed information using commercial product barcodes.

barcode.description: Universal Product Code (UPC) or European Article Number (EAN) barcode digits from product packaging.

drugbank_id.description: The unique DrugBank accession identifier assigned to the pharmaceutical compound.

product_name.description: The commercial product name as registered by the manufacturer.

manufacturer.description: The pharmaceutical company or organization responsible for producing the commercial product.

active_ingredients.description: List of pharmacologically active compounds contained in the pharmaceutical preparation.

dosage_strength.description: The concentration or potency of active ingredients per dosage unit.

packaging.description: Description of the commercial packaging configuration and container specifications.

approved.description: Boolean indicating whether the product has received regulatory approval for marketing.
